headline: Lululemon Founder Chip Wilson Warns CEO Candidates: Fix The Board First
summary: Lululemon Athletica Inc. founder Chip Wilson sent an open letter on Wednesday to prospective CEO candidates. He urged them to scrutinize the company's board before accepting the role. Wilson, one of Lululemon's largest shareholders, controls approximately 9.9 million shares. Wilson Questions Board's Fitness To Lead Wilson warned that three CEO departures without a ready successor signal deeper structural failure.
